shakshi: Sophia told the player the Orrery exists — the knowledge to ask Lucifer about it comes from her
The player understands what the Orrery does — tracks the causal chain that includes Saelith, Hypatia, Luminyx
The player asked Lucifer about the Orrery — the question required carrying Sophia's disclosure into the Pride Ring conversation
Lucifer showed the player the Orrery from the top of his castle — seen but unreachable, the Royal Ring visible in the distance
The player saw where they need to go — the destination is now real and fifteen quests away simultaneously
The player did not ask or did not know to ask — they carry Sophia's words without the visual confirmation
The Orrery is now a known destination — the alchemical chain to reach it is already partially in the player's hands
